Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8012 "180-8012" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "180.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following changes to allow joystick button in port two to start the one player game: 1. Patched the JSR $FF9F instruction at $AD0C to be JSR $0900 instead 2. Added a small routine at $0900 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $C5 to $38 and returns, which causes the game to start just as if 1 was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then JSRs to $FF9F to carry on the normal code flow.
